Chat

Streaming over WebSocket · new session

system

Welcome to GaussClaw. Type a message below — every turn is signed, chained, and replayable from the Receipts tab.

Activity

Live tool events appear here. Hermes can't show this — GaussClaw lifts every tool through the kernel admit gate and surfaces capabilities, taint, and sandbox layers in real time.

  1. No tool activity yet.
model: — taint: ⊥ caps: —
⌘↵ submit · ⌘E open in $EDITOR

Sessions

Full-text + vector search over every conversation. Drop a session id to resume.

Loading sessions…

Tools

Every registered tool, its capability requirement, its taint label, and the sandbox layers it runs inside. Below: preview an unknown Skill Manifest before you install it.

Loading tool catalogue…
Preview a Skill Manifest Paste TOML → parse + validate before install

Output appears after you click Preview.

No skill is installed — preview only.

Receipt chain

Every turn is hashed into a SHA-256 Merkle chain and signed with Ed25519. Anchored to an RFC 3161 TSA every 1,000 entries.

Chain head digest —
Latest turn —
Last TSA anchor awaiting first 1,000-entry batch

Recent receipts

  1. Loading recent receipts…

Verify a trajectory envelope

Drop a Cryptographic Envelope JSON to verify the signature, payload digest, chain link, position witness, and TSA anchor. Hermes ships no equivalent — its JSONL exports carry no verifiable surface.

Cron

Scheduled jobs the agent can fire on duration, cron-expression, or absolute timestamp. Every fire is cap-gated — a job whose payload_caps aren't in the live kernel grant refuses closed. Hermes fires unconditionally.

# Label Schedule Status Next fire Fires Last receipt Actions
Loading scheduled jobs…

Analytics

Aggregate usage across every session retained in the store. Hermes ships AnalyticsPage; GaussClaw adds receipt-chain length as a first-class metric (no Hermes equivalent — its session store ships no chain).

Sessions
—
Turns
—
Signed receipts
—
Distinct models
—
Avg turns / session
—
Most recent session
—

Logs

Recent in-process log entries. Capped at 200 most-recent entries; the buffer is a ring so older lines drop on overflow.

  1. Loading…

Profiles

Configuration profiles discovered in the active config directory. The active profile is the one the binary loaded at start; switching requires an explicit restart with a new --config path (Sprint 5 §10 surface; full multi-profile persistence lands in §10.1).

Loading profiles…

Plugins

Discovered plugins across the user + project discovery roots. Each plugin's caps are declared in its plugin.toml; the kernel admit gate refuses load if the session grant doesn't satisfy them. Hermes plugins inherit full process credentials — ours don't.

Loading plugins…

Health

The seven Self-Diagnostic Health Engine invariants from gauss-health.

Loading SDHE report…

Settings

Provider, model, and runtime configuration. Writes require the cap:config:write grant.

Active provider
Profile—
Provider—
Model—
Provider catalogue
Loading…
Telemetry

GaussClaw never pings home. All health and metric collection happens locally; nothing is sent to a remote server unless you explicitly opt into a federated trajectory pool.

Runtime
Binarygaussclaw
Runtimegauss-aether 1.0
